chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI I.T.R.A 110 of 2015 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________  For hearing of main case 23.09.2025 None present This I.T.R.A is pending since 2015 without any progress. Applicant remains unrepresented without intimation or justification. In view of the judgment of the Supreme Court in the case of Commissioner Inland Revenue, Lahore vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, this reference application is dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge Judge B-K Soomro
